passiveAbilities.name: Dagger
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Joy of Entropy
passiveAbilities.description: Whenever another character within 4" is slain, this character gains +1 energy

passiveAbilities.name: Conductor
passiveAbilities.description: Other friendly Cultists and Spirits within 4" gain +1 Arcane Stat.

activeAbilities.name: Paroxysm
activeAbilities.description: All other models within 3" suffer 4 Magical Dmg then are moved 3" directly away.

arcaneAbilities.name: Leshavit's Caress
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target restores X+1 Wds and gains [Protection: The first time this character would suffer Dmg, reduce that Dmg to W], until end of turn.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 2 Wds. All other models within 6" suffer 1 Wd.
